# Additional Exercises

Extra practice problems to deepen your understanding.

## Exercise Categories

### 1. Attention Variations
- Implement relative positional encoding
- Add causal masking for GPT-style models
- Try different attention implementations (linear, convolution-based)

### 2. Model Architecture
- Build ALBERT with parameter sharing
- Implement RoBERTa without NSP
- Create a distilled student model

### 3. Training Techniques
- Add label smoothing
- Implement warmup learning rate schedule
- Try different optimizers (AdamW, LAMB, LARS)

### 4. Evaluation
- Implement precision, recall, F1 for classification
- Add exact match and F1 for QA
- Create custom evaluation metrics

## Solutions

Check the `solutions/` directory for reference implementations.
